rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms 'Soluta'. gpt-5-mini's note was helpful in highlighting potential ambiguity, but 'a' is clearer on direct observation.
gemini-flash's description 'Dno Rectori, Scholar. & Officiariis' is more accurate on visual inspection (period after Scholar, 'is' ending for Officiariis, and 'Dno' is clearer than 'Do').

Description from gemini-flash matches the text. Visual inspection confirms the amount in pounds is '19', matching gpt-5-mini, not '9' from gemini-flash. Marginal note 'Ad Fest Nativ' is a label, not a separate entry.
rows.english_description: Christmas stipend paid to the college officiaries.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Christmas stipend paid to the college officiaries, amounting to £19 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Amount '84.8.11' confirmed visually, matching gemini-flash. Description 'Do Do to Mr. Dr. Do' from gemini-flash is a plausible interpretation given the 'ditto' nature, despite the extreme faintness of the text. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '24' pounds and had a less accurate description.
rows.english_description: A further Merton dividend payment, same in amount as the previous dividend entry.
rows.english_description_with_amount: A further Merton dividend payment, amounting to £84 8s 11d.
